title: Roasted Irish Padron Pepper Wrap
description: A buttery and gooey Irish dish featuring roasted Padron peppers wrapped in a ssam-wrap, perfect for meal prep. This raw-friendly recipe is cooked to perfection on a binchotan-grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan-grill to medium-high heat.
Toss the Padron peppers with 1 tablespoon of softened butter and season with salt and pepper.
Roast the peppers on the grill for 10 minutes, or until the skin is blistered and charred.
Let the peppers cool, then peel off the skin and slice into strips.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted peppers, shredded cheese, crumbled bacon, and chopped parsley.
Lay a large ssam-wrap flat and spread a quarter of the pepper mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 3 more wraps.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
